questions.question: What happened to the ship carrying Paul to Rome?
options: It was wrecked in a storm near Malta
It was turned back to Caesarea
questions.answer: It was wrecked in a storm near Malta

questions.question: How many people were on the ship with Paul?
Some of the people on the ship died in the shipwreck.
Paul told them, 'I urge you to take _____, for there will be no loss of life among you, but only of the ship.'
An angel of God stood by Paul and said, 'Don't be afraid, Paul. You must stand before _____.'
